primary_ai_task: detection of suspected large vessel occlusion on CT angiography and notification of a specialist
intended_use_summary: Computer-aided triage and notification software that analyzes CT angiography for suspected large vessel occlusion and notifies a neurovascular specialist for prioritized review; not for primary diagnosis.
authorization_performance_claim: sensitivity and specificity for detection of large vessel occlusion versus expert read of CT angiography; time-to-notification benefit
authorization_endpoint: diagnostic accuracy (sensitivity/specificity) for LVO detection and time-to-notification
deployment_output: notification/alert to specialist plus flagged CTA series for review
routine_deployment_evidence: alerts, notification timestamps, specialist acknowledgement; final CTA report exists but is not automatically linked to the AI flag; non-flagged cases are not exported
